description: Cool grown up style comes easy in the skechers Connected Linked shoe. An absolutely casual oxford with a stylish touch, this shoe makes you create a style mantra of your own.Upper Smooth lightly distressed leather upper Lace up casual sneaker design for snug Fit Stitch accents with leather overlay details for extended durability Perforations for ventilation over the toes Side stripes with contrast colored canvas fabric stripes to add weight to the structure Padded collar and tongue with soft fabric shoe lining for comfort fit Midsole Soft, cushy insole for in-step comfort Full length EVA midsole for superior shock absorption Outsole Flexible rubber traction outsole with spiderweb pattern acting as flex grooves for traction Shoe careUse a dry brush to dust off the dirtUse a branded leather polish
